steps.title: Isolate the absolute value
steps.content:
Start with the given equation:
$$
-2|3x+10|+12=-8
$$
Subtract $12$ and divide by $-2$:
$$
-2|3x+10|=-20
$$
$$
|3x+10|=10
$$

steps.title: Solve both cases
steps.content:
The expression inside the absolute value can equal $10$ or $-10$:
$$
3x+10=10
$$
$$
x=0
$$
$$
3x+10=-10
$$
$$
x=-\frac{20}{3}
$$

steps.title: Match the solution set
steps.content: The solution set contains $0$ and $$ -\frac{20}{3} $$ The answer is C.
